general.name: mos_target_catalog_to_marvels_dr12_star_parquet
general.description: The table contains the cross-match between the dr20_catalog targets and the dr20_marvels_dr12_star table.
general.naming_convention: $MOS_TARGET/[V_TARG]/[FTYPE]/mos_catalog_to_marvels_dr12_star.[FTYPE] with FTYPE='parquet' and V_TARG='2.0.0' for DR20.

changelog.description: Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another

catalogid.name: catalogid
catalogid.description: The catalogid identifier in the dr20_catalog table.

target_id.name: target_id
target_id.description: The primary key identifier in the dr20_marvels_dr12_star table.

version_id.name: version_id
version_id.description: The internal version for the cross-match.

distance.name: distance
distance.description: The distance between the catalog and target coordinates if best=F.

best.name: best
best.description: Whether this is considered the best match between the catalog entry and dr20_marvels_dr12_star.

plan_id.name: plan_id
plan_id.description: Identifier of the cross-matching plan used to generate this file.

added_by_phase.name: added_by_phase
added_by_phase.description: The phase of the cross-match in which this target was added.
